history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with curly dark hair is standing in front of a bathroom mirror, looking at his reflection. He is wearing a black jacket with a light blue graphic design on the back and light brown pants. The jacket has some text on the back that is partially visible. The man is leaning over a white sink with a chrome faucet. The bathroom has a modern design with dark tiled walls and a white countertop. The mirror reflects the man and the bathroom interior, including stalls with dark doors. The lighting is bright and even, coming from above and behind the mirror, creating a clean and contemporary atmosphere. The overall mood is casual and self-aware, with a focus on the subject and his reflection. The color palette is dominated by dark tones, with accents of white, chrome, and the light blue graphic.
